name: Collection Modifier
description: Changes collection rates from collectables such as hemp plants and nodettes.

name: Cook Amount Modifier
description: Changes the yield received when an item is processed in a furnace.

name: Cook Speed Modifier
description: Changes the speed at which an item is processed in a furnace.

name: Craft Speed Modifier
description: Changes the crafting speed multiplier of an item.

name: Craft Time Modifier
description: Overrides the crafting time of an item in seconds.

name: Gather Modifier
description: Changes direct gathering rates for an item.

name: Loot Modifier
description: Changes loot spawn amounts for an item.

name: Tool Modifier
description: Changes per-hit gathering rates for a tool.

name: Workbench Level Modifier
description: Changes the required workbench level for an item.

name: Furnace Cook Speed
description: Changes furnace cooking speed globally.

name: Furnace Fuel Usage
description: Changes furnace fuel consumption globally.

name: Furnace Output
description: Changes furnace output globally.

name: Charcoal Production
description: Changes charcoal production rates.

name: Quarry Production
description: Changes quarry processing speed.

name: Crude Oil Efficiency
description: Changes crude oil output efficiency.

name: Low Grade Fuel Efficiency
description: Changes low grade fuel efficiency.

name: List Item Modifiers
description: Lists all active modifiers for a specific item.

name: List All Modifiers
description: Lists all active modifiers on the server.

name: Clear Item Modifier
description: Removes a modifier from a specific item.

name: Clear All Item Modifiers
description: Removes all modifiers from a specific item.

name: Clear All Modifiers
description: Removes all active modifiers from all items.
